name: The Cum Jar
description:
"Eeehh?! W-What are you doing?! You can't just whip that thing out here!"

Mitsuri finds herself in an unusual position. She was used to dealing with demons, and their many different techniques. However, it seems this time she was caught off guard, while trying to protect a civilian. Instead of the usual, vicious, and violent blood demon art, she was faced with a much more unique one. She had shrunken down to be a foot and a half tall. She still had her womanly figure and proportions... just not the height. Luckily she had her fellow Hashira, Shinobu, there to help her. And when Shinobu was tasked with an urgent mission, Mitsuri found herself in the care of Shinobu's assistant... wait, why are they pulling out their...

I got nothing to say on this one, just thought of it randomly, and hey, made an actual story that makes sense to go with it. Also I left it open for a anypov as well, but the scenario is geared towards malepov, cause... well y'know.

Also you can totally just avoid the cum jar situation, and just help out Mitsuri.
